◎简　　介  

　　She Loves Me is a musical with a book by Joe Masteroff, lyrics by Sheldon Harnick, and music by Jerry Bock.She Loves Me was revived again on Broadway in 2016, and the production became the first Broadway show ever to be live-streamed.
